ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who left the rating */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "star1" INTEGER /* Number of 1-star ratings */,
  "star2" INTEGER /* Number of 2-star ratings */,
  "star3" INTEGER /* Number of 3-star ratings */,
  "star4" INTEGER /* Number of 4-star ratings */,
  "star5" INTEGER /* Number of 5-star ratings */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback provided by the customer */,
  "usefulness_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating how useful other customers find the rating */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Overall rating score of the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the feedback is about */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who submitted the feedback */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the customer feedback */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company's response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the company responded */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the company's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the review is about */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "usefulness_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating how useful other customers find the review */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the question is about */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who asked the question */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's question */,
  "is_answered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question has been answered */,
  "upvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the question has received */,
  "downvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the question has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being answered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the answer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the answer was provided */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's answer */,
  "upvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the answer has received */,
  "downvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the answer has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES product_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_answers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_tags_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image is associated with */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the main image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the video is associated with */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is the main video for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_videos_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
